title: Nigel Farage Cameo videos backed cryptocurrencies that collapsed in value
description: Cameo videos produced by the Reform UK leader were used to drum up interest in obscure memecoins
content:
Nigel Farage has profited by producing Cameo videos that endorsed or provided support to cryptocurrencies which later collapsed in value.
The videos were discovered by the Guardian within a collection of more than 4,000 clips he has created on the Ca... [5090 chars]

title: TOWIE and Ex On The Beach's Jordan Wright found dead in Thailand
description: A Foreign Office spokeswoman says Jordan Wright's family is being supported.
content:
Tributes have been paid to a former British reality television personality who has died in Thailand.
Jordan Wright, 33, from Basildon, appeared on The Only Way Is Essex (Towie) in 2018 and on Ex on the Beach in 2017.
Fellow Towie personality Chloe Br... [275 chars]

title: Family pays tribute to 'kindest' teenage girl after car crashes into river - as man still missing
description: Eden Bunn, 16, died after the car she was travelling in left the road and entered the River Nene near Wisbech on Tuesday.
content:
The family of a 16-year-old who was killed after a car crashed into a river in Cambridgeshire has paid tribute, calling her the "kindest, most loving girl".
Eden Bunn was among five people in a blue VW Polo, which veered off the road into the River N... [1888 chars]

title: Reports of children as young as 11 abused in West Midlands mini-marts, BBC reveals
description: Child sexual abuse reports go back 10 years and were seen by safeguarding group which included police
content:
A senior council worker repeatedly shared with West Midlands authorities reports of children as young as 11 being sexually abused in High Street mini-marts, the BBC can reveal.
The reports were raised multiple times with police and safeguarding partn... [7129 chars]

title: Trump references Pearl Harbor during meeting with Japanese PM on Iran war
description: US president said that Japan was ‘stepping up to the plate’ to support the US war without offering details.
content:
United States President Donald Trump has told Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi that he expects her country to “step up” to assist with securing the Strait of Hormuz amid the US- and Israeli-led war against Iran.
